commit_scope: Ship form-first-router.fk — the Form-first sovereignty gate as a four-way-proven Form recipe (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu, verdict 511), closing the recipe named in form-first-reasoning.form. Adds the recipe, its proof band, the fourth-arm manifest row, the INDEX edge, and updates CLAUDE.md + the teaching from 'not yet shipped' to proven.
evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/form-first-router.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-first-router-band.fk -> '✓ core.fk+form-first-router.fk+form-first-router-band.fk → 511' and 'fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)' and '1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree on every sample.'
Manifest row added: 'form-first-router fks 511' in form/fourth-arm-bands.txt, next to its kin recognition-router.

The band pins the gate at its boundaries: grounded-structural -> relay/body/sovereign (c0-c2); structural-but-ungrounded -> NOT a hit, escalate (c3-c4, the honesty lane); frontier -> escalate (c5-c6); grounded-yet-frontier STILL misses (c7, the strange edge — kind gates it, grounding alone never earns a relay); sovereign-count over the 4-query batch == 1 (c8). Verdict 511 only when every claim lands.

Edges landed in the same commit: INDEX.md row for form-first-reasoning.form, the teaching updated from 'wants to become a four-way-proven recipe' to proven (verdict 511), CLAUDE.md closing-recipe line updated from 'not yet shipped' to four-way-proven.
Primitive discipline held: only core.fk primitives (nth, str_eq, eq, and (binary), if, add, len, head, tail, recursion); no sub/mul/div, no 3-arg and, no let-in-defn, emptiness via (eq (len x) 0).

fourth_arm_outputs: form-first-router: verdict 511, fourth arm 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables), 1 ok, 0 divergent — kernels agree

ci_validation.notes: CI has not run yet for this branch. The change adds a Form stdlib recipe + band + fourth-arm manifest row; CI re-runs validate.sh across the suite.

deploy_validation.notes: A Form stdlib recipe and proof band plus orientation docs; no public HTTP endpoint or service changes. The recipe is the proven body of the Form-first gate; it reaches agents through the repo, not a deploy.

phase_gate.reason: Local four-way validation passed (verdict 511, 0 divergent); CI and merge remain pending. No deploy applies to a Form stdlib recipe.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Form-first sovereignty gate is now a runnable, four-way-proven recipe (form-first-router.fk) rather than only a prose directive: ffr-hit?, ffr-path, ffr-source, ffr-escalate?, and ffr-sovereign-count decide relay-from-body vs escalate-to-remote, and Go/Rust/TS/fkwu agree on verdict 511.
public_endpoints: none changed; the recipe is a Form stdlib body proven by validate.sh
test_flows: Four-kernel proof: validate.sh runs the band on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu to the identical verdict 511 with 0 divergent.
Boundary proof: the band asserts both the positive (a grounded structural query relays from the body) and the negatives (ungrounded structural, frontier, and grounded-yet-frontier all escalate).
